_comment: Beds24 v2 booking webhook sample payload (realistic field names).
_notes: propId / unitId are Beds24 v2 native integer IDs.
lastNight = LAST NIGHT of stay. Checkout morning = lastNight + 1 day.
minimumStay is NOT present in booking webhook payloads.
It is a room inventory setting from GET /v2/inventory/rooms.
Rooms synced from webhooks are stored as inactive (null minimumStay)
until a separate inventory sync populates external_minimum_stay.
propName and unitName may not be included in all webhook deliveries.
When absent, propId and unitId are used as fallback identifiers.
To test locally: POST this file to /api/beds24/webhook with
x-beds24-webhook-secret header matching BEDS24_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var.
